dashboard.title: Trading Sessions
dashboard.empty: No trading sessions yet. Create your first one!

common.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this session?

landing.hero_subtitle: AI reads the headlines so you don't have to. Get trade signals powered by Gemini, backed by C++ math, and tracked in real time — all with zero real money at risk.
landing.features_title: Everything You Need to Trade Smarter
landing.features_subtitle: From AI-generated signals to real-time position tracking, Munnir gives you a complete trading sandbox.
landing.feature_ai_desc: Gemini AI analyzes geopolitical news and generates BUY/SELL/HOLD signals with conviction scores, risk ratings, and detailed reasoning.
landing.feature_autopilot_desc: Set your interval and let the AI trade for you. From 5-minute scalps to daily positions — fully autonomous trading cycles.
landing.feature_engine_desc: Position sizing, risk calculations, and P&L math run in compiled C++20 via pybind11. Fast and precise, all in integer cents.
landing.feature_risk_desc: Choose Low, Medium, or High risk tolerance. The engine adjusts position sizes and the AI adapts its signal generation accordingly.
landing.feature_charts_desc: ECharts-powered balance visualization with trade markers, portfolio stats, and performance tracking across all your sessions.
landing.feature_transparency_desc: Every trade links back to the AI reasoning that triggered it. Expand any trade to see exactly why the AI made that call.
landing.step_1_desc: Set your virtual balance and risk tolerance to start a new trading session.
landing.step_2_desc: Gemini scans geopolitical headlines and generates a trade signal with conviction and reasoning.
landing.step_3_desc: Review the signal and decide — or enable Auto-Pilot to let the AI handle it.
landing.step_4_desc: Watch your portfolio evolve. Review trades, P&L, and the AI's justification for every move.
landing.tech_subtitle: A full-stack trading platform from frontend to compiled math engine.
landing.final_cta_title: Ready to Trade on Global Events?
landing.final_cta_subtitle: Create your free account and start your first AI-powered trading session in seconds.
landing.footer_tagline: Named after Muninn — Odin's raven of memory.
landing.footer_disclaimer: For educational and simulation purposes only. Not financial advice.

detail.chart_empty: No trades yet — analyze news to get started.
detail.pending_empty: No pending signals. Click Analyze News to generate one.
